integration_gates_failed.message: Required scientific integration gates are not all passing.
suggestions: Verify gate statuses and re-run in strict mode.
Temporarily disable strict gate enforcement only for controlled debugging.

scientific_loop_failed.message: Scientific loop execution failed before producing a valid receipt.
suggestions: Run scientific_method_loop directly to isolate root cause.

channel_revoked.message: Requested release channel is currently revoked for safety.
suggestions: Review revoke reason in channel state.
Restore channel only after verifying integrity/parity checks.

approval_required_for_risk_tier.message: Action requires explicit approval at this risk tier.
suggestions: Provide approval artifact and rerun command.
Lower risk tier only if policy allows and rationale is documented.

root_surface_contract_failed.message: Root surface contract check failed due unapproved root entries.
suggestions: Move non-root assets to the proper namespace.
Update root surface policy only when entry is intentionally public.
